text:
Created attachment 178546
Patch

This is a new Port for typo3 Version 8

https://typo3.org/news/article/typo3-v80-start-your-engines/

This Port needs PHP7 or newer

poudriere build fine for:
10.3 amd + i386
11.0 amd + i386
12-current amd + i386 (r310257)

portlint -AC is also fine.


Cheers
jochen
